$comment: System workspace layout seed definitions for sprk_workspacelayout (isSystem=true). Consumed by Deploy-SystemWorkspaceLayouts.ps1. Section factory IDs MUST match src/solutions/LegalWorkspace/src/sectionRegistry.ts. Layout template IDs MUST match src/client/shared/Spaarke.UI.Components/src/components/WorkspaceShell/layoutTemplates.ts.

layouts.name: Daily Briefing
layouts.description: Wave 2b will auto-install this as the default landing workspace. Replaces hard-coded WorkspaceHomeTab.

layouts.name: Smart To Do List
layouts.description: LegalWorkspace todo section (Smart To Do List).

layouts.name: My Work
layouts.description: LegalWorkspace quick-summary section. Wave 3 task 109 extends with sprk_communication + sprk_invoices cards (no layout JSON change).

layouts.name: Documents
layouts.description: LegalWorkspace documents section (Active Documents). Wave 3 task 110 verifies + add / expand affordances embed-safe in SpaarkeAi.
